g.text: Two successive dbt runs — how the incremental filter clips records

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: W-103 / W-104 were still writing at Run 1, so they were held back.
Run 1 advanced the watermark to W-102's last write. At Run 2 they've
settled — but the filter admits only modified_at > watermark, so every
record written before it is never re-scanned. Silently dropped.
